matches.moment: Conceição's diagonal dribble draws a Karimov foul — Fernandes converts from the spot. The 3-back buckles as Portugal press with must-win urgency.
Bellingham's set-piece delivery finds Kane unmarked at the far post. Madueke punishes Ghana on the counter as they push for an equaliser.
Godoy fouled 22 yards out in the 80th minute. Rodríguez curls the free kick into the bottom-right corner. A dead ball decides a game neither team could crack in open play.

Díaz cuts inside on Wan-Bissaka and drills low into the corner. After Colombia's penalty, Wissa lofts home a long diagonal on the counter — potentially the 2nd African player to score in his first two World Cup matches.

verdict: Tuesday, June 23 is the day Group K and Group L crystallise into recognisable shapes. Portugal's match against Uzbekistan is a referendum on whether Roberto Martinez's side can recover the attacking intent absent against DR Congo — Uzbekistan's defence conceded three to Colombia, and with Rúben Dias back, Portugal have the cover to press without vulnerability. The only uncertainty is whether Ronaldo contributes anything: his -2.8 post-shot xG over 10 consecutive major tournament appearances is the most damning individual stat at this World Cup. England vs Ghana is the day's most lopsided contest — 2.8 xG generated against Croatia makes 2-0 the data-consistent outcome, not a generous one. Partey's return upgrades Ghana's midfield but does not bridge the talent gap. Panama vs Croatia is the day's most volatile fixture: the market prices Croatia at 64% but their actual tournament xG is 0.71, and the opponent-strength adjustment shows they couldn't score against Czechia-level opposition in qualifying. Panama's set-piece delivery and mutual desperation produce the one draw of the day. Colombia vs DR Congo is the evening showcase — Wissa's goal against Portugal confirmed DR Congo carry a genuine cutting edge, and the 2-1 vs 1-1 call hinges on Colombia's ability to contain his counter-attacking runs in the final 20 minutes.

players.name: Bruno Fernandes
players.stat: 4 key passes vs DR Congo (WC MD1)
players.watch: Through-ball to Conceição behind Uzbekistan's wide coverage; free-kick delivery

players.name: Cristiano Ronaldo
players.stat: -2.8 post-shot xG over last 10 major tournament matches
players.watch: Whether he ends a 10-game major tournament goalless run — the defining story of Portugal's campaign

players.name: Jude Bellingham
players.watch: Late surging runs into the box; England's set-piece delivery built around his left foot

players.name: Yoane Wissa
players.stat: 0.82 xG vs Portugal (WC MD1) · 8 goals in 37 caps
players.watch: Transition goal — would make him 2nd African player to score in his first two World Cup matches (after Salah 2018)

players.name: Luis Díaz
players.watch: Combination with James Rodríguez through the half-space; first-touch finish inside the box
